clarified_problem: Create a scalable web application to shorten URLs efficiently.
assumptions: The service should handle high traffic and request rates.
Persistence will be managed using MongoDB or PostgreSQL for data storage.
Analytics will be integrated with Google Analytics or custom tracking system.

tasks.title: LLM Task 1
tasks.description: Define the architecture of the application including front-end, back-end, database, and analytics components.

ai_assist.prompt: Refine this task into implementation steps: Define the architecture of the application including front-end, back-end, database, and analytics components.
ai_assist.expected_ai_output: Draft implementation artifacts that require engineer review before acceptance.

tasks.engineer_validation: Confirm the task output is technically correct, scoped, and testable.

artifacts.api_contract: Define API endpoints, request/response formats, security measures (e.g., OAuth2), and rate limiting strategies.
artifacts.task_summary: L1: LLM Task 1 | L2: LLM Task 2 | L3: LLM Task 3 | L4: LLM Task 4 | L5: LLM Task 5 | L6: LLM Task 6 | L7: LLM Task 7 | L8: LLM Task 8
test_plan: Write unit tests for backend logic, integration tests for APIs, and system tests for performance and stability.
Set up automated deployment pipelines using CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins or GitHub Actions).
artifacts.documentation: Create comprehensive user documentation and API reference materials.
artifacts.requirement: Detailed requirements document outlining all features and functionalities.

checks: All core artifact sections are present.
Task dependency graph is internally consistent.
risks: Test plan may be insufficient for broad behavioral coverage.
AI-assisted execution traceability is weak; add notes on prompt and review decisions.
AI-generated tasks can miss hidden constraints unless manually reviewed.
Performance and abuse protection controls are not production-complete in this prototype.
